TextView.android:text:
Hydration Tips

1. Morning Water
Drink a glass of water right after waking up to kickstart your metabolism.

2. Mid-Morning Hydration
Sip water every hour to stay energized.

3. Before Meals
Drink a small glass of water 15 minutes before meals to aid digestion.

4. During Exercise
Take small sips of water every 15-20 minutes during workouts.

5. Avoid Sugary Drinks
Limit soda and sweetened beverages; choose water instead.

6. Keep a Water Bottle
Carry a reusable bottle to remind yourself to drink throughout the day.

7. Hydrating Foods
Include fruits and vegetables like cucumber, watermelon, and oranges.

8. Monitor Urine Color
Clear to light yellow indicates proper hydration.

9. Evening Hydration
Drink water steadily; avoid too much right before bed.

10. Set Reminders
Use phone alarms or apps to prompt regular water intake.
